# Files that must exist on main. Used by protect-main and deploy workflows.
# If Figma Make "Push to GitHub" removes these, the push is reverted automatically.

src/app/components/AdminView.tsx
src/app/App.tsx
.github/workflows/deploy-frontend.yml
.github/workflows/protect-main.yml
.figma/make/dev
FIGMA_SYNC.md
scripts/figma-make-sync-prompt.txt
